title.en: The strength of this multi-dimensional life tea...

content.en:
The strength of this multi-dimensional life team is not weak, three of them are in the sixth realm, and the others are all in the fifth realm.

In other words, the ordinary sixth realm can't deal with it at all, let alone the fifth realm to deal with it.

"Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning-Sword Eleven!"

Ye Tian slashed away with a sword, and instantly slashed one of the Sixth Realm multi-dimensional beings led by him, and the aftermath of his attack directly annihilated the other Fifth Realm multi-dimensional beings.

The other two Sixth Realm multidimensional beings wanted to escape, but they were too late.

Swish!

Ye Tian used the Ten-Dimensional Void Technique to chase and kill instantly, and then cast the Ten Dimensional Sword Silk of the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Learning, and the Ten Dimensional Sword Silk combined with the eightfold dimensional rules, it still severely damaged these two Sixth Realm multi-dimensional beings.

After a few breaths, these two Sixth Realm multi-dimensional beings were directly killed.

After killing these multi-dimensional beings, Ye Tian took away all their resources and treasures before leaving.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian returned, put the resources in his hand on another copy body, and then continued to look for resources.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian used this method to obtain a lot of resources, but sometimes he was also unlucky, encountering an enemy that he couldn't deal with, he didn't show all his strength, and directly blew himself up, so as to avoid exposing his strength.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already accumulated a large number of resources, most of which were obtained by killing multi-dimensional lives, and a few were collected and found by himself.

That's enough resources to buy the Silver Mystery Illustrated Book.

However, he has to pay half of his resources to the Tianshu Sect, and if he really hands over so many resources, it will definitely attract the attention of the Tianshu Sect!

It is too much of a problem for a single fifth realm to obtain so many resources.

However, Ye Tian had already thought of a way.

He was going to copy the body of a member of the Fifth Realm of the Heavenly Shu Sect and leave here.

According to his understanding, the Tianshu Sect does not charge for its own people, nor does it inspect them, and allows them to come and go freely.

That way, he can walk away with a mix.

Even if the problem was exposed afterwards, Tianshu Sect couldn't deduce any traces and couldn't find his head.

"Let's do it, use the identity of the fifth realm of the Heavenly Shu Sect to go out, and then come back, unaware. "

Ye Tian decided.

......

Tianshu Sect Dimensional Channel.

Ye Tian came out as the fifth realm transcendent realm of the Tianshu Sect, and then quickly handed over with another true body copy body, transferred the resources, and then after a while, returned to enter the Tianshu battlefield again.

Since the Tianshu Sect had a very lenient policy towards its own people, Ye Tian did not attract any attention.

In this way, Ye Tian successfully brought out all the resources without giving any resources to the Tianshu Sect.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian sold the resources obtained in his hands one after another, in exchange for a large number of multi-dimensional Tongbao, and finally scraped together enough more than 300 million Duowei Tongbao.

this day.

Ye Tian went to trade the Yinxuan Illustrated Book, and this Yinxuan Illustrated Book had not been sold, so it was directly traded by him.

After coming back.

Ye Tian took the silver mystery book that looked like a scroll in his hand, revealing an excited look.

Subsequently, he began to refine the Silver Xuan Illustrated Guide, and after successfully controlling it, he began to use the Silver Xuan Illustrated Guide.

As a result, the effect was beyond his expectations, and it was really good.

Compared with the Yinxuan Illustrated Book, his previous Ten Pivot Gold Plate was simply spicy chicken.

"With the Silver Xuan Illustrated Book, it will be easier for me to comprehend the rules of the dimension, and it will not take too long to comprehend the rules of the ninth dimension!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

As long as he comprehends the rules of the ninth dimension, he can easily break through to the sixth realm 100%, and it is the most perfect way to break through.

Of course.

He would still collect the resources and treasures of the Tianshu Battlefield, it was a good place, and he couldn't give it up.

However.

After a long time, he sometimes failed to kill all the fifth-realm multi-dimensional lifeforms, and even occasionally when he killed the fifth-realm multi-dimensional lifeforms, he would be bumped into by some of the sixth realm.

He knew very well that if he continued, he would probably expose the problem.

So after collecting enough resources, Ye Tian was finally ready to leave.

The Tianshu Sect is now a behemoth to him, and he can't afford to offend him.

this day.

Ye Tian went out, but he only carried the resources that the normal Fifth Realm should obtain, and after paying half of the resources, he left the Tianshu battlefield.

Before you know it, hundreds of millions of extradimensional epochs have passed.

At this moment, Ye Tian was at a critical moment, and he was attacking the rules of the ninth dimension.

Soon.

Rumble!!!!

The rules of the Nine Dimensions permeated his body.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian smiled.

At this point, it would be extremely simple for him to break through to the sixth realm, and there was no problem of failure to break through.

Subsequently.

......

Territory of 5,000.

Ye Tian made a breakthrough here.

Time passes.

Ye Tian used the ninefold dimensional rules to continuously turn the dimensional void in his body into reality, and gradually, the dimensional void in his body gradually transformed into reality, and his body began to transform in this situation, absorbing the massive energy of the outside world.

Rumble!!!!

The body is transforming, and all aspects are breaking through.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian's internal dimensional void has completely transformed into reality, and his cultivation has stepped into the early stage of the sixth realm.

Moreover, his physical fitness has also broken through, and his soul will has also broken through.

"This is the Sixth Realm, it's too powerful, my current strength is definitely the top level in the Sixth Realm!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

After cultivating to break through, he did not rush to break through, but began to cultivate the innate multi-dimensional Dao body of that sect, and he wanted to break through those innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies to the fifth layer realm.

Breakthrough of the black mother's body!

10-Dimensional Celestial Breakthrough!

Canghai sword body breakthrough!

Breakthrough of the Four Tribulation Dao Body!

Breakthrough of the Ten Winged Dao Body!

After a long time, all of his innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies broke through to the fifth layer realm, and the dimensional body underwent a fundamental qualitative change.

Moreover, his soul will broke through from the eleventh dimension to the twelfth dimension, which was also a huge breakthrough.

In the future, if he creates the Twelfth Dimensional Will Peerless Technique, the Six Realms Supreme Peerless Technique, or even the Six Realms Supreme Absolute Peerless Technique, his strength will be raised to an extremely terrifying level, and he may be called the Sixth Realm Invincible Combat Power.

However, it is extremely difficult to do this, and it is not possible to do it in a short time.

And he has another thing, and that is to create the fifth layer of the Kasya's intelligent body, and this is not a difficult thing.
